---
name: Automation Request
about: Suggest an idea for a new automation
title: '[REQUEST] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What is the problem you're trying to solve?**
A clear and concise description of the repetitive task or bottleneck. Ex. "I spend 3 hours a week copying lead data from my email to my CRM."

**How would you want the automation to work?**
What is the trigger? (e.g. Schedule, Webhook, New Email)
What are the steps? (e.g. Parse email, hit OpenAI API, send to Notion)
What is the output? (e.g. A new Notion database row)

**Are there any specific tools/APIs involved?**
Please list the platforms required (e.g., Airtable, Slack, Mailchimp, Stripe).

**Additional context**
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
